summary: Diff implements the requested Bolt Now checkout flow changes: adds a new /address-confirmation page with browser geolocation + manual address entry, wires routing/search params so /payment-options can receive productId + address/location (with fallback when missing), adds payment-method-specific required fields/validation gating proceed, and updates /payment-success copy to “Bolt Now”. However, the diff summary also indicates several unrelated branding/UI/feature changes (e.g., BAT‑BUDDY rebrand, homepage/booking/admin enhancements) that were not requested in this BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Site-wide BAT‑BUDDY branding/visual refresh (header/footer/homepage palette, hero images, contact number updates, etc.) beyond the requested “Bolt Now” copy fix on /payment-success.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asked to replace “Volt Now/VOLTNOW” with “Bolt Now” on /payment-success and to add address + payment detail steps to the Bolt Now checkout flow; it did not request a broader rebrand or homepage design changes.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (entries for frontend/src/components/Header.tsx, frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx, frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, frontend/src/index.css)

hallucinated_features.description: Enhancements to BookingPage including GPS-based location detection and backend battery compatibility finder hook usage.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not part of REQ-8 to REQ-11 checkout-flow changes; also the request constraints indicated no backend changes were required for this request.

hallucinated_features.description: Expanded/feature-rich AdminDashboard and TechnicianDashboard capabilities (booking management, inventory control, analytics, job status management, etc.).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-8 to REQ-11; unrelated to checkout flow copy, address confirmation step, router wiring, or payment-method detail collection.
